---
title: Wintertime particulate matter decrease buffered by unfavorable chemical processes
  despite emissions reductions in China
pagetitle: 2020-6-1-Leung2020 - Gang Chen
body-classes: publication-page
format:
  html:
    title-block-style: none
year: 2020
author: Danny M. Leung, Hongrong Shi, Bin Zhao, Jing Wang, Elizabeth M. Ding, Yu Gu,
  Haotian Zheng, Gang Chen, Kuo‐Nan Liou, Shuxiao Wang, Jerome D. Fast, Guangjie Zheng,
  Jingkun Jiang, Xiaoxiao Li and Jonathan H. Jiang
venue: Geophysical Research Letters
venue_cit: <i>Geophysical Research Letters</i>, doi:10.1029/2020GL087721.
recommended_citation: 'Danny M. Leung, Hongrong Shi, Bin Zhao, Jing Wang, Elizabeth
  M. Ding, Yu Gu, Haotian Zheng, Gang Chen, Kuo‐Nan Liou, Shuxiao Wang, Jerome D.
  Fast, Guangjie Zheng, Jingkun Jiang, Xiaoxiao Li and Jonathan H. Jiang, 2020: Wintertime
  particulate matter decrease buffered by unfavorable chemical processes despite emissions
  reductions in China, <i>Geophysical Research Letters</i>, doi:10.1029/2020GL087721.'
paper_url: https://onlinelibrary.wiley.com/doi/abs/10.1029/2020GL087721
---

::: {.page-with-sidebar}

::: {.sidebar-col}
{{< include /_author-profile.qmd >}}
:::

::: {.content-col}

# Wintertime particulate matter decrease buffered by unfavorable chemical processes despite emissions reductions in China

*Published in Geophysical Research Letters, 2020*

**Recommended citation:** Danny M. Leung, Hongrong Shi, Bin Zhao, Jing Wang, Elizabeth M. Ding, Yu Gu, Haotian Zheng, Gang Chen, Kuo‐Nan Liou, Shuxiao Wang, Jerome D. Fast, Guangjie Zheng, Jingkun Jiang, Xiaoxiao Li and Jonathan H. Jiang, 2020: Wintertime particulate matter decrease buffered by unfavorable chemical processes despite emissions reductions in China, <i>Geophysical Research Letters</i>, doi:10.1029/2020GL087721.

[Download paper](https://onlinelibrary.wiley.com/doi/abs/10.1029/2020GL087721){target="_blank"}

:::

:::
